meaning: n.阵风,一阵狂风,(雨、冰雹、烟、火、声音等的)突然一阵,(感情的)迸发,汹涌
examples: A gust of wind blew my hat off.
A gust of wind flapped the tents.
A gust of wind drove down the valley.
Gust also claimed US Airways failed to honor his wages as exempt from withholding.
The destructive and deadly wind gust on Saturday evening in Indianapolis was no chance occurrence.
